raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Un no Lewja fazzija wiꞥsch:
Gr: Taws Tumim / un taws Urim
laid palek pee tawa fwehta Wiḣ-
ra/ ko tu effi fahrdinajs Maṣṣā/
ar ko tu bahrees pee ta Bahr-
schanas Uhdens.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Kas us fawu Tehwu un
us tawu Mahti fazzija : Es ne
redsu winnu / un kas fawus
Brahtus ne atsinne / un fawus
Dehlus ne pasinne/ jo tee farga-
ja tawu Wahru/ un turreja ta-
wu Derribu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Tee mahzihs Jehkubain
tawas Teefas/ un Israëkain ta-
wu Bauflibu/ tee liks Kwehpja-
Sahles preekfch farahni Mah-
tim/ un weffelus Uppneus us ta-
wu Altari.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Swehti KUNGS winna
Spehku/ un laid winna Rohku
Darbs tew patihk/ fasitt tohs
Gurnns to/ kas prett to usstahw/
un winnu eenihst/ ka tee ne warr
zeltees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "12. Un no Benjamina faz-
zija wiꞥsch: Ta KUNGA Mih-
ligajs dsihwohs drohschi pee win-
na/ wiꞥsch apfegs to ikdeenas /
un dsihwohs starp winna Rame-
scheem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "13. Un us Jahsepu fazzija
wiꞥsch / winna Semme laid irr
fwehtita no ta KUNGA/ no ta
Debbes Labbuna / no Raṣṣas /
un no teem Dsitkumeem/ kas us
appakfchn gull.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "14. No teem wiꞥstabbafeem
Saules Augteem / no ta wiꞥs-
labbaka Mehnes Auguma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. Un no teem wiꞥslabbakee
Kalneem prett Rihteem/ un no
Labbuna to paleekamo Pakaln-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "16. Un no teem wiꞥslabbakee
Semmes Augteem / un winna
Pilnibas / un ta pascha Apsche-
lotchana/ kas Kruhmā dsihwoj
laid naht us Jahsepa Galwu/ u
us Nasira Galwas Wirfu / sta-
faweem Brahteem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "17. Winna Gohds irr / itt
winna Wehrscha Pirmdsintaj
un winna Raggi irr / ka Wee-
radscha Raggi /ar teem fabaddih
wiꞥsch tohs Laudis kohpa lih-
Semmes Gallam / schee irr E-
wriima dauds tuhkstoschee / u-
schee irr Manafus tuhkstoschee.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "18. Un no Sebulana fazzij
wiꞥsch : Preezajes Sebulan-
pahr tawu Jsgahjunn / un J-
safchars pahr tawn Dsihwokli.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "19. Tee atzinahs tohs Laudi
Kalnā/tur uppurehs tee tahs Tai-
nibas Uppneus / jo tee sihdih-
tahs Juhras Baggatibu/un tah-
apfegtas patlehptas Mantas
Smiltis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "20. Un no Gada fazzija wiꞥsch
fwehtihts laid irr / kas Gadu is-
platta/ wiꞥsch gull itt ka Lauwa-
un laupa tik labbi to Elkonu / ka-
Galwas Wirfu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "21. Wiꞥsch gahdaja Gesahkn-
mā * preekfch fewis / jo eekfch ta-
Bauflibas-Deweja Daltas tap-
pe wiꞥsch glabbahts / un gahje-
preekfch to Lauschu Wirfneefeem-
un padarrija ta KUNGA Taiint-
bu/ un winna Teefas ar Israëlu.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
